title: Analytics - Find My Device Sound Played
scenario: Find My Device sound trigger event count does not update in logs until several hours later on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the phone.
Tap the Find My Device tab.
Select the connected Poly Bluetooth audio device from the list.
Tap the Play Sound (or Trigger Sound) button to play a tone on the device.
Wait for the sound to finish playing on the device.
After a few hours, check the event count for related elements (e.g., logs or analytics counters) in the app or backend.
expected: The event count for related elements (e.g., Find My Device sound triggers) increases after some time (usually a few hours).
